title: Patch Embedding & Tokenization
description: System splits image/video frames into spatial or spatio-temporal patches and embeds them into transformer-ready token sequences, with optional multiview and trajectory conditioning.

actors.name: DiffusionPipeline
actors.description: Top-level diffusion model that drives the forward pass — supplies (B, C, T, H, W) latent tensors, timesteps, FPS, padding masks

actors.name: MultiviewInputSource
actors.description: Provides interleaved multi-camera frames packed as (B, C, V*T, H, W) and per-view trajectory tensors

actors.name: TransformerBlocks
actors.description: Downstream GeneralDITTransformerBlock modules that consume the patch token sequence (B, T, H, W, D) or (T, H, W, B, D)

use_cases.name: Tokenize Spatial Patches (2D/3D)
use_cases.description: PatchEmbed divides input tensor (B, C, T, H, W) into non-overlapping patches of size (temporal_patch_size × spatial_patch_size²) and projects each to a D-dimensional embedding vector, producing (B, T', H', W', D).
key_logic: Mode A (default/inference): Rearrange 'b c (t r) (h m) (w n) -> b t h w (c r m n)' then nn.Linear(C*r*m*n, D)
Mode B (legacy_patch_emb=True, training): nn.Conv3d(C, D, kernel=(t_patch, s_patch, s_patch)) then Rearrange 'b c t h w -> b t h w c'
Output shape: (B, T/patch_t, H/patch_s, W/patch_s, model_channels)

use_cases.name: Build Patch Embedder (Base)
use_cases.description: GeneralDIT.build_patch_embed() instantiates PatchEmbed as self.x_embedder with optional +1 channel for padding mask.
key_logic: self.x_embedder = PatchEmbed(spatial_patch_size, temporal_patch_size, in_channels, model_channels, bias=False)

use_cases.name: Build Patch Embedder (Multiview)
use_cases.description: MultiviewGeneralDIT.build_patch_embed() overrides the base to expand in_channels by view_condition_dim (and optionally traj_condition_dim) before constructing PatchEmbed.
key_logic: self.x_embedder = PatchEmbed(spatial_patch_size, temporal_patch_size, in_channels, model_channels, bias=False, keep_spatio=True, legacy_patch_emb=self.legacy_patch_emb)

use_cases.name: Concatenate Padding Mask Channel
use_cases.description: Before tokenization, the binary padding mask is resized to match spatial dims (H, W) and appended as an extra channel along dim=1.

use_cases.name: Embed Per-View Camera Conditioning
use_cases.description: Learnable per-view embeddings (nn.Embedding) are generated for each of the n_views cameras and concatenated spatially to the input tensor.
key_logic: Rearrange & broadcast to [B, view_condition_dim, V, T, H, W]
x = rearrange(x, 'B C (V T) H W -> B C V T H W')
x = rearrange back to 'B C (V T) H W'

use_cases.name: Embed Repeat-Frame Conditioning
use_cases.description: Optional per-view frame-repeat scalar is projected via nn.Linear(1 → view_condition_dim) and added to view_embedding to signal repeated/static frames.

use_cases.name: Embed Trajectory Conditioning
use_cases.description: Optional camera trajectory vectors (dim=192) are projected via nn.Linear(192 → traj_condition_dim) and concatenated alongside view embeddings before patch projection.
key_logic: Broadcast to [B, traj_condition_dim, V, T, H, W]

use_cases.name: Apply Rotary Positional Embedding (RoPE 3D)
use_cases.description: MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb generates per-head rotary frequency tensors keyed to (T, H, W) grid — returned as rope_emb_L_1_1_D to be applied inside attention layers.
key_logic: len_h = max_img_h // patch_spatial; len_w = max_img_w // patch_spatial; len_t = max_frames // patch_temporal
Passed through to transformer blocks; NOT added to x directly

use_cases.name: Apply Absolute Sincos Positional Embedding (per-block)
use_cases.description: MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis generates extra absolute positional embeddings added to each transformer block input (extra_per_block_abs_pos_emb path).
key_logic: Output shape: (B, T, H, W, D) or (T, H, W, B, D) depending on block format
Added inside each GeneralDITTransformerBlock rather than once at input

use_cases.name: Prepare Full Embedded Sequence
use_cases.description: Orchestrates the full tokenization pipeline: mask concat → view embed → traj embed → patch project → positional embed. Returns (x_B_T_H_W_D, rope_emb, extra_pos_emb).
key_logic: Returns Tuple[Tensor(B,T,H,W,D), Optional rope Tensor, Optional extra_pos Tensor]
Downstream: x reformatted to BTHWD or THWBD for transformer blocks

use_cases.name: Tokenize Video Extension with Condition Mask
use_cases.description: VideoExtendGeneralDIT adds a video condition mask channel (in_channels+1) and concatenates condition_video_input_mask (and optional pose) to x before calling the multiview tokenization pipeline.
key_logic: In forward(): x = cat([x, condition_video_input_mask, condition_video_pose?], dim=1)
Handles cp_group context-parallel split: rearrange -> split_inputs_cp -> rearrange back

key_classes.name: VideoExtendGeneralDIT
key_methods: forward() — prepends condition_video_input_mask and optional pose to x

key_relationships: MultiviewGeneralDIT overrides build_patch_embed() to widen in_channels with view/traj dims
Training PatchEmbed supports legacy Conv3D mode OR modern Rearrange+Linear mode
tokenization_flow: 1. Input: (B, C, V*T, H, W) multiview video latent
2. [Optional] Concatenate padding mask channel → (B, C+1, V*T, H, W)
3. Generate view embeddings [V, view_condition_dim] via nn.Embedding, broadcast to (B, D_v, V, T, H, W)
6. Rearrange & cat: (B, C+D_v[+D_t], V*T, H, W)
9. MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis → extra_pos_emb (B, T, H, W, D) for per-block injection
10. Output: (x_tokens, rope_emb, extra_pos_emb) passed to TransformerBlocks
important_notes: patch_spatial is a tuple (or int) — spatial patch size applied equally to H and W
patch_temporal is int — temporal patch stride
Training PatchEmbed (blocks.py in training/) differs from inference: supports legacy Conv3D + keep_spatio=True required
MultiviewGeneralDIT only supports pos_emb_cls='rope3d' — sincos raises ValueError
VideoExtendGeneralDIT auto-increments in_channels by 1 for condition mask; no PatchEmbed rebuild needed
Context-parallel (cp_group) splitting for condition mask is handled in VideoExtendGeneralDIT.forward() before patching
